name: Groundwater
description: Subsurface water-column probes: borehole, well, and piezometer level/pressure loggers. A member reports water level and/or hydrostatic pressure.
notes: Membership is `atLeastOne` of water.level / water.pressure: a logger that reports either qualifies. water.pressure is hydrostatic (kPa) — never map liquid pressure to air.pressure (atmospheric, 900-1100 hPa). water.ec is the water-column conductivity in µS/cm (distinct from soil.ec in dS/m).
